name: sports-betting-platform
description: Full-featured sports betting platform using MERN stack

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:admin
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:admin && npm run install:shared

author: Sports Betting Platform Team
